title.zh: 中国家具进入澳大利亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家具進入澳洲：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China furniture documentation against Australian Consumer Law product safety duties, ACCC mandatory toppling furniture information rules, button and coin battery standards for furniture with remotes or electronic accessories, upholstery flammability expectations, and voluntary formaldehyde emission evidence for wood-based panels.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家具文件与澳大利亚消费者法产品安全义务、ACCC家具倾倒强制信息规则、带遥控器或电子配件家具的纽扣/硬币电池标准、软垫阻燃性预期及木基板材甲醛释放自愿性证据的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家具文件與澳洲消費者法產品安全義務、ACCC家具傾倒強制資訊規則、帶遙控器或電子配件家具的鈕扣/硬幣電池標準、軟墊阻燃性預期及木基板材甲醛釋放自願性證據的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, Australian Consumer Law assessment, recall decision, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current ACCC Product Safety guidance, Australian Consumer Law mandatory standards, Federal Register instruments, state and territory requirements, and applicable voluntary AS/NZS standards with qualified professionals before import or supply.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定、澳大利亚消费者法评估、召回决定或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在进口或供应前，应与合格专业人士核验现行ACCC产品安全指引、澳大利亚消费者法强制标准、联邦法规文书、州和领地要求及适用的自愿性AS/NZS标准。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定、澳洲消費者法評估、召回決定或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在進口或供應前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行ACCC產品安全指引、澳洲消費者法強制標準、聯邦法規文書、州和領地要求及適用的自願性AS/NZS標準。

answer_first.en: For Chinese furniture exported to Australia, the main gaps are: mandatory ACCC toppling furniture warning and safety-information rules from 4 May 2025 for covered clothing storage units, bookcases, entertainment units, hall tables, display cabinets, buffets and sideboards; mandatory button and coin battery standards for furniture with remotes, lights, memory modules or electronic accessories; no UK-style national mandatory upholstery flammability regime, although general safety duties and buyer specifications still matter; and formaldehyde evidence for wood-based panels is usually managed through voluntary AS/NZS 4266 or buyer limits rather than a furniture-specific national mandatory standard.
answer_first.zh: 中国家具出口澳大利亚的主要差距包括：自2025年5月4日起，适用的衣物收纳柜、书柜、电视柜、玄关桌、展示柜、餐边柜和边柜须满足ACCC家具倾倒强制警示及安全信息规则；带遥控器、灯具、记忆模块或电子配件的家具须符合强制纽扣/硬币电池标准；澳大利亚没有类似英国的全国性强制软垫家具阻燃制度，但通用安全义务及买方规范仍然重要；木基板材甲醛证据通常通过自愿性AS/NZS 4266或买方限值管理，而非家具专项全国强制标准。
answer_first.zht: 中國家具出口澳洲的主要差距包括：自2025年5月4日起，適用的衣物收納櫃、書櫃、電視櫃、玄關桌、展示櫃、餐邊櫃和邊櫃須滿足ACCC家具傾倒強制警示及安全資訊規則；帶遙控器、燈具、記憶模組或電子配件的家具須符合強制鈕扣/硬幣電池標準；澳洲沒有類似英國的全國性強制軟墊家具阻燃制度，但通用安全義務及買方規範仍然重要；木基板材甲醛證據通常通過自願性AS/NZS 4266或買方限值管理，而非家具專項全國強制標準。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official Australian regulator (ACCC Product Safety, ACCC), Federal Register of Legislation, standards body, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
